name: mojo-dataloader-deferral-resolution
description: Resolve PythonObject interop deferral placeholders in Mojo training loops by replacing them with real DataLoader iteration. Use when: (1) a Mojo function accepts PythonObject as a data loader but a native DataLoader struct already exists, (2) run_epoch() or similar training loop methods always return 0.0 due to a deferred interop placeholder, (3) Track 4 / Python-Mojo interop deferral comments exist in training code.
